description: MCT metamorphics: phyllite 40%, schist 30%, quartzite 20%, gneiss 10%
Himalayan granites, granodiorites — crystalline intrusive bodies
Gabbro, dolerite, amphibolite — dense mafic plutonics
River alluvium, slope debris, colluvium — loose material
Volcanic tuff, ash layers — weakest volcanic type
